profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Jasa Berdikari Logistics Tbk provides transportation management services in Indonesia. The company is involved in the provision of dedicated and integrated logistics services, warehouse management system solutions, and planning, implementation, and on-site management services. It offers pre-delivery inspection, rectification, repacking, kitting, and assembly services; and engages in ambient, chilled, frozen, dangerous, and bonded operation activities. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Jasa Berdikari Logistics Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Ervin Niaga Abadi.
